title: West St. Louis County Region Overview
content:
West St. Louis County encompasses suburbs west of I-270 to the Missouri River. Emphasizes space and suburban lifestyle with homes on larger lots.

Key Features: Upscale neighborhoods, golf courses, parks, award-winning school districts. Housing: spacious newer construction, 1970s-80s homes, rural estates on wooded lots. Easy access to Clayton, Chesterfield Valley, St. Charles County.

Major Communities: Town and Country (luxury estates with country charm), Clarkson Valley, Wildwood (secluded rural estates with parks), Ballwin (West County subdivisions at lower price points), Ellisville, Manchester, Valley Park, Chesterfield (new homes with shopping), Des Peres (centrally-located new neighborhoods), Eureka (small-town feel with golf courses), Country Life Acres, Twin Oaks, Winchester.

Recreation: Castlewood State Park, Babler State Park, Queeny Park. Waterparks, dog parks, walking trails. Quality public school districts: Rockwood and Parkway.
